purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

evidence: string

current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions. Phase R68 heuristic gap scan complete: all 8 new missions have dedicated test coverage for evidence specifications.
current.phase: Phase R68 — heuristic gap scan complete
current.milestone: All PRD-backed released-scope clauses have dedicated test coverage
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.phase: Phase R68 — heuristic gap scan complete

history.summary: Phase R68 heuristic gap scan complete: Added 8 dedicated pytest test functions documenting primary evidence specifications for all 8 new released missions (sync_observation through run_completion). Updated test_released_missions_use_primary_truth_types_only to verify all 12 missions use only primary truth types. Updated module docstring to reference all 12 missions as specified in PRD Release Boundary lines 47-60. All 13 tests passing in test_released_mission_evidence_specs.py. Compressed work-rag.json history from 6 entries to 3 (kept latest 2 raw checkpoints, compressed older entries into 1 phase summary). Coverage ledger updated: Phase R68 heuristic gap scan marked covered. Next action set to FINAL_STOP — Phase R68 complete. Total validation: 756 tests passing (621 unit + 135 others), mypy clean, ruff clean.

history.phase: Phase R67 — scope expansion: pageReadyObserved to runCompletion
history.milestone: All 8 modeled missions promoted to released, full 12-mission pipeline
history.summary: Phase R67 complete: 7 families fully implemented and verified. Scope expansion from pageReadyObserved to runCompletion: Mission registry promotion (attach_session through run_completion as RELEASED_MISSIONS), PRD documentation updates (prd.md, current-state.md, core-loop.md), graph wiring (8 new execute_*_node functions, 12-mission sequence), evidence adapter specs (primary and fallback evidence for all 12 missions in client.py and pyautogui_adapter.py), integration and E2E test validation (all 12-mission sequences verified), heuristic phase test cleanup (R44, R47-R50 updated for new ceiling). Final state: 748 tests passing (4 E2E, 744 unit), mypy clean, ruff clean. All 7 scope-expansion-* families marked covered in coverage ledger. Release barrier enforced at runCompletion with typed stop-proof validation.
